signal_title: Publicação de Orientações sobre Identificação e Mapeamento de Dados Pessoais pelo LNCC
risk_rationale: The regulatory guidance emphasizes compliance with the LGPD, which aligns with existing data protection and privacy requirements. However, the focus on personal data identification and mapping may require additional measures to ensure full compliance.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Annual transparency report on government access
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Identification and mapping of personal data
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The baseline does not explicitly cover detailed identification and mapping of personal data as emphasized by the new guidance.

remediations.title: Implement Personal Data Mapping Procedures
remediations.description: Develop and implement procedures for the identification and mapping of personal data to ensure compliance with LGPD as per the new guidance.
acceptance_criteria: Procedures for data mapping are documented and implemented
Compliance with LGPD data identification requirements is verified

business_impact: Moderate impact due to potential need for additional data management processes and compliance verification efforts.
recommended_actions: Conduct a gap analysis to identify current data mapping capabilities
Develop a project plan for implementing data mapping procedures
Engage with legal and compliance teams to ensure alignment with LGPD requirements
